data.content: Plan: contain compat-status to the beads backend, then remove shared-layer surface. Phase A — move mapWorkflowStateToCompatStatus + mapStatusToDefaultWorkflowState from workflows-runtime.ts into a new src/lib/backends/beads-compat-status.ts, drop WorkflowRuntimeState.compatStatus, and inline the status→state mapping inside deriveBeadsWorkflowState only (so shared deriveWorkflowState becomes label/descriptor-native). Phase B — delete compat-status-usage.ts + its test, delete mapKnotsStateToFooleryStatus / mapFooleryStatusToKnotsState from knots-compat.ts (zero live callers), rename the leftover constants file to knots-constants.ts. Phase C — relocate mapping-function tests into __tests__/beads-compat-status.test.ts, strip compatStatus assertions from workflows-coverage-{labels,inference}.test.ts, replace mapStatusToDefaultWorkflowState calls in mock-backend-port.ts with direct fixture literals, narrow docs/adr-knots-compatibility.md. Run bun lint/tsc/test/build after each phase. No new generic translation layer; beads keeps its mapping locally because beads still exists.
